title: My Work - possibility to change order of tasks on list
excerpt: Very helpfull feature would be possibility to change manually order of tasks in my work section. Now it is based only on date and time (so you need to pick time for every task to make it in order) - i think that section …

posts.author: pawel_wach (Paweł)
posts.cookedHtml: Very helpfull feature would be possibility to change manually order of tasks in my work section. Now it is based only on date and time (so you need to pick time for every task to make it in order) - i think that section my work suppose to have same workflow as other boards - if you want to change order of tasks you can just hold a task and move it up or down.
